Specialties.name: Leap-Charms
Specialties.description: Provides the user with a single, silent 50-foot jump.

Specialties.name: Pop-Bolts
Specialties.description: A standard crossbow bolt enchanted to explode in a silent, concussive burst upon impact.

Structure.name: Settlement Patterns
Structure.description: Villages are either semi-nomadic or entirely subterranean and camouflaged.

Structure.name: Communication Methods
Structure.description: The Whispering Network: a complex language of natural sounds, specific animal calls, and subtle trail markers.

Geopolitical Role.Protocol for Engagement: A rigid and specific protocol, including the use of a non-invisible tent and escorted access.

Reputation.Mercenaries and Scouts: Formidable reputation for destabilizing superior enemies, securing objectives through unconventional means, or providing peerless reconnaissance.
